EmailTemplate.description: Have been unsuccessful in connecting with customer to answer their query.
EmailTemplate.name: Task Closed (CAT)
EmailTemplate.subject: Update on your query
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We have recently made numerous attempts to contact you in relation to your query.
Unfortunately, we have not been successful in getting in touch, so we have closed this matter internally.
If you do still wish to discuss this with us, please feel free to give us a call on 01242 808740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
